items.title: Architecting Modern AI Systems
items.author: MLOps.community
items.summary:
As AI systems evolve into more autonomous, agent-driven architectures, the way we design platforms, tools, and infrastructure is rapidly changing. In this session with BuzzHPC, we’ll explore the shifting boundary between platforms and tools, what developers expect platform providers to handle versus what they want to control and build themselves. 

We’ll unpack what modern agentic stacks look like today, how teams are structuring them in production, and where these architectures are heading as systems become more complex and distributed. A key focus will also be on agent interoperability, how different agents communicate, coordinate, and operate within shared environments.

Finally, we’ll share insights and lessons from a recent AI hackathon delivered in partnership with Bell, Buzz, Mila, and KHP, highlighting how these concepts are being tested and applied by builders in real-world scenarios.

items.title: Learn T-SQL With Erik: Aligning Queries and Indexes Part 1
items.author: Erik Darling (Erik Darling Data)
items.summary:
In this video, I delve into optimizing SQL Server queries by better aligning them with existing indexes to enhance performance. We explore various techniques such as changing join types and using derived joins versus cross applies to leverage index benefits more effectively. By rewriting the query in different ways, we demonstrate how these changes can significantly reduce execution timeâ€"from 3 seconds down to just 15 milliseconds in some casesâ€"highlighting the importance of understanding your indexes and how they interact with your queries. Whether you're a seasoned SQL Server professional or new to T-SQL tuning, there's plenty to learn from this practical walkthrough that will help you write more efficient code.

CHAPTERS

00:00:00 - Introduction
00:01:01 - Helpful Links and Services
00:02:01 - Free SQL Server Performance Tool
00:03:43 - Current Indexes Overview
00:05:04 - Query Analysis and Challenges
00:06:12 - Index Seek Improvements
00:07:22 - Cross Apply for Better Performance
00:08:13 - Execution Plan Breakdown
00:10:04 - Final Optimization Steps

Confluent Developer provides comprehensive resources for developers looking to learn about Apache Kafka®, Apache Flink®, Confluent Cloud, Confluent Platform, and any other technology related to the broader Data Streaming Platform. Content on Confluent Developer includes courses, getting started guides, topical deep-dives, patterns, tutorials, and listings of community events. Learn more at https://developer.confluent.io.
